title: QuizPlayer Schema
description: JSON Schema for QuizPlayer multiple-choice question (MCQ) practice files

title.description: The title of the MCQ practice set.

description.description: A brief overview or description of what the quiz covers.

version.description: Version identifier for this practice set (e.g. '1.0').

questions.description: List of practice questions in the quiz.

id.description: A unique question identifier (can be a number or string).

category.description: The category topic of this question (e.g. 'Income Tax', 'Deductions').

question.description: The question statement text displayed to the user.

options.description: A list of 2 to 6 options to choose from.

answer.description: The 0-based index of the correct answer in the options array (e.g., 0 for the first option).

explanation.description: A detailed explanation of why the correct option is the right answer.
